title: Asia markets open higher amid hopes of a U.S.-Iran deal; China trade data in focus
summary: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday as investors remain optimistic about potential U.S.-Iran negotiations and await China's economic data. The positive sentiment reflects cautious hope for diplomatic progress on a key geopolitical tension.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday, amid positive investor sentiment that a deal between the U.S. and Iran is still possible

zh.title: 亚太市场随美伊协议希望升高；中国贸易数据成焦点
zh.summary: 亚太市场周二开盘走高，投资者对潜在美伊谈判保持乐观，等待中国经济数据。积极情绪反映了人们对这一关键地缘政治紧张局势外交进展的谨慎希望。

title: WNBA No. 1 draft pick Azzi Fudd will make $500,000 as a rookie — more than a 500% raise over last year’s pick
summary: WNBA's No. 1 draft pick Azzi Fudd will earn $500,000 in her rookie season, over 500% more than last year's top pick. The significant raise reflects the league's new labor agreement, which has created the wealthiest rookie class in WNBA history.
content: The WNBA’s latest labor agreement paved the way for the league’s wealthiest rookie class ever

zh.title: WNBA状元秀Azzi Fudd新秀赛季年薪50万美元——比去年状元高薪超500%
zh.summary: WNBA状元秀Azzi Fudd将在新秀赛季赚取50万美元，比去年状元高出500%以上。这一重大加薪反映了联盟新劳动协议，该协议创造了WNBA历史上最富有的新秀班级。
